parsed_output.justification: Justin explicitly claims to have been a werewolf at the start of the game ('I'm going to go out on a leg and I'm going to say that I was a werewolf when we started'). While this could be a bluff by the Tanner to attract votes, it is the most direct admission of the role provided in the transcript. Additionally, Mitchell confirms his intention to vote for Justin, making him the primary target of the group.
